title: ANIMAL ADOPTION - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity to adopt animals, all of which have been spayed and neutered. This is a no-kill shelter. 2910 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week noon-5pm; except major holidays Email (541) 779-3215 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-3215 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties SITE HOURS: noon-5pm 7 days per week Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTHERN OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY
